title: Farmhouse TimberTouch™ Resin Cross Back Chair - White with Black Grain
features: Designed to replicate the warm, rustic look of a wooden cross back chair without the weight or maintenance demands, the Farmhouse Resin Cross Back Chair is built for rental fleets and event venues that want a farmhouse aesthetic at commercial scale.
Ships fully assembled, stacks 8 to 10 high for efficient storage.
Available in Dark Brown with Black Grain, Medium with Black Grain, and White with Black Grain.

Looks like wood, performs like commercial resin. Dark Brown, Medium, and White finishes with Black Grain texturing replicate the natural appearance of a wooden cross back chair while eliminating the warping, splitting, and refinishing demands that real wood requires over a rental season.

Lighter than wood means faster event turnarounds. At 11 lbs. per chair, the Farmhouse Resin Cross Back is noticeably easier to handle than wood alternatives, which adds up quickly across large setups and significantly reduces crew time on delivery, setup, and teardown.

Handles outdoor events without degrading. Moisture-resistant resin and a UV-stable finish hold up through outdoor ceremonies, garden receptions, winery events, and tented events without fading, swelling, or requiring any special post-event treatment.

Stacks 8 to 10 high for efficient storage and transport. A compact footprint when stacked keeps warehouse space manageable and simplifies loading, and at 11 lbs. per chair, moving full stacks is straightforward with or without a dolly.
Ships fully assembled and ready to deploy immediately. No setup time, no hardware, no assembly on arrival — chairs come ready for your next event from the moment the order is received.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more

faq.question: Will I be able to stack my Cross Back Chairs
faq.answer: Yes, all of our Cross Back Chairs are stackable. We generally stack them 7 chairs high on the floor, on pallets or on one of our stacking chair dollies.

faq.question: What is the maximum number to stack for transport and storage?
faq.answer: We recommend stacking cross back chairs 8-10 high.

faq.question: How does the resin finish compare to a real wood cross back chair?
faq.answer: Visually, the Dark Brown, Medium, and White finishes with Black Grain texturing are designed to replicate the appearance of natural wood grain at event distances. Functionally, resin outperforms wood in a commercial context: it does not warp or split under moisture exposure, requires no refinishing, cleans quickly between events, and is lighter per chair — making it better suited for operations running multiple events per week.

faq.question: How many chairs can be stacked?
faq.answer: Chairs stack 8 to 10 high. At 11 lbs. per chair, a stack of 10 weighs approximately 110 lbs. and can be moved efficiently using the Universal Stacking Chair Dolly, available as an accessory.

faq.question: Are these chairs suitable for outdoor use?
faq.answer: Yes. Resin construction and a UV-stable finish make these chairs well suited for outdoor ceremonies, garden receptions, winery events, and tented events. Storing them indoors between events will extend their lifespan, but the surface is designed to handle normal outdoor event exposure without fading or degrading.

faq.question: Are protective covers available for storage?
faq.answer: Yes. Crossback Chair Protective Covers re fits over stacked chairs to protect them from dust and debris during warehouse storage and transport.

faq.question: What colors and finishes are available?
faq.answer: Three finishes are available: Dark Brown with Black Grain, Medium with Black Grain, and White with Black Grain. All three are designed to replicate the appearance of natural wood grain and work well across farmhouse, rustic, outdoor, and casual formal event settings
